problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: TenderAI: Explainable AI System for Automated Tender Eligibility Evaluation
summary: Design an AI platform to automate tender evaluation, eligibility analysis, and produce explainable reports for government procurement.
key_steps: Extract eligibility criteria from tender documents
Map extracted bidder data to each criterion
optimization_claims: Provides complete audit trail for government compliance
constraints_addressed: Handles scanned and low-quality documents using OCR
